updates.title: Google AI Mode Now Shows Shopping Ads and Sponsored Stores
updates.summary: Google AI Mode, with 75M+ daily active users, now supports shopping ad formats and sponsored stores inside conversational search. Advertisers using PMax, Shopping, and Search broad match are automatically eligible.
updates.action: Ensure you are running PMax or Shopping campaigns with broad match to appear in AI Mode. No separate opt-in needed.

updates.title: PMax Gets Auto AI Voice-Overs on Video Ads (Opt-Out by Mar 20)
updates.summary: Google is auto-enrolling advertisers into an AI voice-over program that narrates PMax video ads using headlines and descriptions. Ads without existing audio get voice enhancement automatically unless you opt out by March 20.
updates.action: Check your PMax video ads. If you do not want AI-generated voice-overs, opt out before the deadline. If your videos already have audio, they are not affected.

updates.title: March Demand Gen Drop: AI Video from Images + Creator Partnership Discovery
updates.summary: Google launched Veo AI video generation from static images for Demand Gen. New creator partnership tool lets you find YouTube creators and turn their content into ads. Creator assets drive 30% conversion lift on YouTube Shorts on average.
updates.action: Test Veo AI video generation from your best product images. Use the creator partnership discovery tool to find authentic ad content.

updates.title: Google March 2026 Core Update Rolling Out
updates.summary: Google launched its March 2026 core update alongside a spam update. Semrush Sensor reported Very High keyword volatility for nearly the entire month. Major ranking shifts across all verticals.
updates.action: Do not make reactive SEO changes during the rollout. Monitor rankings for 2-3 weeks. Focus on content quality and E-E-A-T signals.

updates.title: Meta Shifts to Outcome-Based Optimization: Performance Drops Expected
updates.summary: In the first week of March, Meta moved from auction-based placement optimization to outcome-based optimization. The system now predicts downstream conversions rather than optimizing for intermediate engagement metrics. Performance drops reported across accounts.
updates.action: Give campaigns 7-10 days before making changes. Focus on conversion goals, not engagement metrics. Compare against CRM data, not platform-reported numbers.

updates.title: Meta Ad Policy Crackdown: 34% More Rejections in Health/Wellness/Beauty
updates.summary: Meta upgraded its multimodal AI enforcement in Q1 2026 with new rules on misleading claims, personal attributes detection, crypto ad tiers, and blood sugar/diabetes restrictions. Rejection rates spiked 34% for health, wellness, and beauty verticals.
updates.action: Audit all ad copy in health/wellness/beauty for claims compliance. Remove before/after language, implied diagnoses, and unsubstantiated health claims.

updates.title: Advantage+ Sales Threshold Drops to 25 Conversions/Week, Predictive Budgets Added
updates.summary: Advantage+ Sales now requires only 25 conversions per week to qualify, down from 50. New Predictive Budget Allocation dynamically shifts spend based on predicted conversion probability, reporting 8-15% ROAS improvement.
updates.action: Re-evaluate Advantage+ for accounts that previously could not hit the 50 conversion threshold. Enable Predictive Budget Allocation and test for 2 weeks.

updates.title: Meta NewFronts: Reels Trend Ads, Creator Discovery, AI Creative Tools
updates.summary: At IAB NewFronts, Meta announced ad placements aligned with Reels trends, improved creator partnership discovery, and new AI creative tools. Also expanded affiliate program and in-stream checkout options for creators.
updates.action: Explore Reels trend-aligned placements for cultural relevance. Use the new creator discovery tools to find authentic content partners.

updates.title: Meta Location Fees: Ad Prices Rise in 6 Countries Starting April
updates.summary: Meta will add Location Fees to cover Digital Service Taxes starting April 2026. Rates: Austria 5%, France 3%, Italy 3%, Spain 3%, Turkey 5%, UK 2%. Meta will no longer absorb these costs.
updates.action: Factor Location Fees into budget planning for EU/UK campaigns. Adjust CPA targets upward by the fee percentage for affected countries.

updates.title: TikTok NewFronts: 5 New Premium Ad Formats Including Logo Takeover
updates.summary: TikTok unveiled Logo Takeover (brand logo on splash screen), Prime Time (3 sequential ads in 15-min window), TopReach (TopView + TopFeed combined), Pulse Mentions (ads next to brand mentions), and Pulse Tastemakers (ads alongside curated creators).
updates.action: Consider Logo Takeover or TopReach for product launches. Test Pulse Mentions to appear next to organic brand conversations.

updates.title: HubSpot 2026: Search Is No Longer the Starting Point for Most Buyer Journeys
updates.summary: HubSpot 2026 State of Marketing report (1,500+ marketers) found buyers now move through AI tools, social feeds, creator content, communities, and review sites before reaching a brand website.
updates.action: Map your buyer journey across AI tools, social, review sites, and communities. Invest in presence across all these touchpoints, not just search.

updates.title: WPP Dissolves Holding Company Model: Merges Ogilvy, VML, AKQA
updates.summary: WPP announced Elevate28, dissolving its holding company model and consolidating Ogilvy, VML, AKQA, and WPP Media under a unified structure. Targeting 500M GBP in annualized savings by 2028.
updates.action: If working with any WPP agency, expect structural changes. This signals a broader industry shift toward consolidated, AI-driven agency operations.
